component.name: StreamSelectorItem
component.script:
sub init() m.itemFocus = m.top.findNode("itemFocus") m.itemText = m.top.findNode("itemText") m.itemChecked = m.top.findNode("itemChecked")
m.top.observeField("itemContent", "itemContentChanged") m.top.observeField("focusPercent", "onFocusPercentChanged") m.top.observeField("width", "onWidthHeightChanged") m.top.observeField("height", "onWidthHeightChanged") end sub
function isValid(obj) as boolean return obj <> invalid end function
sub itemContentChanged() itemData = m.top.itemContent if not isValid(itemData) then return
m.itemText.text = itemData.title
' Observe the checked field for changes itemData.unobserveField("checked") itemData.observeField("checked", "onCheckedChange") onCheckedChange() end sub
sub onCheckedChange() itemData = m.top.itemContent if isValid(itemData) m.itemChecked.visible = (itemData.checked = true) end if end sub
sub onFocusPercentChanged() m.itemFocus.visible = (m.top.focusPercent > 0.5) if m.top.focusPercent > 0.5 m.itemText.color = "#FFFFFF" m.itemChecked.blendColor = "#FFFFFF" else m.itemText.color = "#FFFFFF" m.itemChecked.blendColor = "#FFFFFF" end if end sub
sub onWidthHeightChanged() m.itemFocus.width = m.top.width m.itemFocus.height = m.top.height m.itemText.width = m.top.width - 80 m.itemText.height = m.top.height m.itemChecked.translation = [m.top.width - 44, (m.top.height - 24) / 2] end sub
